description_long: This is a modern, single-story garage structure with a prominent sloped metal roof and a rectangular footprint. The front facade features a large, vertically segmented garage door with a series of narrow, dark-tinted windows above, providing natural light to the interior. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal siding on the lower half and shingle-style cladding on the upper half, separated by a horizontal trim. A single wall-mounted light fixture is positioned centrally above the garage door, adding both functionality and a touch of style. The side and rear walls are solid, with no visible doors or windows, emphasizing security and privacy. The overall design is clean and contemporary, suitable for integration into urban or suburban environments.
description: A modern garage with a sloped metal roof, large segmented front door, and a mix of horizontal siding and shingle cladding. Features dark-tinted upper windows and a central exterior light.
description_view_0: Front view showing the segmented garage door, upper windows, shingle and siding cladding, and a central wall light.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying a solid wall with horizontal siding and no windows or doors, dominated by the metal roof.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the sloped roof, shingle and siding cladding, and absence of doors or windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the shingle and siding cladding and the continuous row of upper windows.
